# Scenario: User sends message, server confirms, assistant responds
# Reproduces: user text disappearing after optimistic delete+recreate

:session ses_test_optimistic
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

:api POST /session/ses_test_optimistic/prompt_async 204 null

# --- User sends (optimistic render) ---
:eval (opencode-chat--send "commit and push")

# --- Server confirms user message ---
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","info":{"id":"msg_user1","role":"user","sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","time":{"created":1000},"agent":"build","model":{"providerID":"P","modelID":"m"}}}}}

# --- Server sends user text part ---
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","part":{"id":"prt_user_text","type":"text","text":"commit and push","messageID":"msg_user1","sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic"},"time":1001}}}

# --- Session busy ---
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}

# --- Assistant message ---
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","info":{"id":"msg_asst1","parentID":"msg_user1","role":"assistant","mode":"build","agent":"build","path":{"cwd":"/tmp","root":"/tmp"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}},"modelID":"m","providerID":"P","time":{"created":2000},"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic"}}}}

# --- Assistant streams text ---
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","part":{"id":"prt_asst_text","type":"text","text":"I will help","messageID":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_test_optimistic","time":{"start":2001}},"delta":"I will help"}}}

# --- Assertions ---
:assert-contains commit and push
:assert-contains I will help
